name: github_search_issues
description: Search GitHub for issues by query string, owner, or repository

name: github_create_issue
description: Create a new GitHub issue with title, body, and labels

name: github_create_pr
description: Create a pull request on GitHub with source and target branches

name: github_list_repos
description: List repositories for a GitHub user or organization

name: web_search
description: Search the web for information using a search engine query

name: web_fetch
description: Fetch and extract content from a specific URL

name: memory_query
description: Search semantic memory for relevant past context, decisions, or facts

name: memory_add
description: Store a new memory entry with content and metadata

name: project_index
description: Index project files for semantic code search

name: project_search
description: Search indexed project files using a semantic query

name: knowledge_graph_query
description: Query the knowledge graph for entity relationships and inference chains

name: code_lint
description: Run linters and formatters on code files to enforce style rules

name: code_format
description: Auto-format code files according to project style conventions

name: test_run
description: Run unit or integration tests in the project

name: git_commit
description: Create a git commit with staged changes and a message

name: git_branch
description: Create, list, or switch git branches

name: docker_run
description: Run a command inside a Docker container

name: shell_exec
description: Execute a shell command and return stdout, stderr, and exit code
